---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement (user-facing or developer-facing)
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What

<one-line: the capability you want>

## Why

<problem this solves, or workflow it unlocks. Concrete > abstract — "I want X
so that Y" or "today I have to do A B C, this would replace it with D">

## Sketch (optional)

<a hint about shape — UI surface, command name, hotkey, config flag,
endpoint shape, etc. Don't over-design here.>

## Out of scope

<what NOT to bundle in — keeps the issue tight>

## Related

<linked tasks/issues/PRs, prior discussion>
